description: Complete all remaining features from naver-content-optimizer.md plan

stories.title: Dev Auth Bypass for Testing
acceptanceCriteria: Middleware allows access to protected routes when DEV_AUTH_BYPASS=true env var is set
A mock session is provided with test user data for dev bypass mode
auth() function returns a valid session object in bypass mode so API routes work
Production safety: bypass only works when NODE_ENV=development OR DEV_AUTH_BYPASS=true
All existing protected pages render without login when bypass is active

stories.title: Analyze/Compare Dedicated Page
acceptanceCriteria: Page exists at /analyze/compare with proper layout
Supports 2-5 keyword input fields for comparison
Fetches keyword data for all keywords simultaneously
Displays comparison table with: search volume (PC/mobile), competition, saturation index, keyword grade
Responsive design works on mobile and desktop
TypeScript compiles without errors

stories.title: Saved Keywords Page & Bookmarking
acceptanceCriteria: saved_keywords table operations (CRUD) implemented in a service
API route /api/keywords/saved supports GET (list), POST (save), DELETE (remove)
Page at /keywords shows saved keywords with memo, date, and quick actions
Bookmark button integrated in analyze page results to save/unsave keywords
Usage limit check for free users (max 10 saved keywords)
TypeScript compiles without errors

stories.title: Toss Webhook Signature Verification
acceptanceCriteria: Webhook route /api/webhooks/toss verifies Toss signature using HMAC-SHA256
Handles payment.done event: updates subscription status to active
Handles payment.failed event: marks subscription as failed
Handles billing.expired event: marks subscription as expired
Returns 200 on valid signature, 401 on invalid
TypeScript compiles without errors

stories.title: Recurring Billing Cron Job
acceptanceCriteria: /api/cron/billing endpoint authenticates with CRON_SECRET header
Queries subscriptions due for renewal (current_period_end <= now)
Charges each subscription via Toss billing key
Updates subscription period dates on successful charge
Handles charge failure: marks subscription, notifies user (or logs)
TypeScript compiles without errors

stories.title: Keyword Expansion UI Enhancement
acceptanceCriteria: Analyze page shows related/expanded keywords in a dedicated section
Each related keyword shows: keyword text, monthly search volume, competition
Click on related keyword triggers new analysis for that keyword
Related keywords can be copied as tags (comma-separated)
TypeScript compiles without errors

stories.title: Tag Copy Integration Across Pages
acceptanceCriteria: Analyze page: copy keyword + related keywords as hashtags (#키워드 format)
Bulk analysis page: copy all analyzed keywords as tags
Copy button shows toast/feedback on successful copy
TypeScript compiles without errors

stories.title: Build & Deploy Verification
acceptanceCriteria: TypeScript compilation passes with zero errors
Next.js build succeeds without errors
Vercel deployment succeeds
All pages load correctly on deployed URL
API routes respond correctly (test keyword search, AI features)
